description_long: This object is a handheld digital multimeter, commonly used for measuring electrical values such as voltage, current, and resistance. The front face features a large LCD display at the top, a rotary selector dial in the center, and several color-coded input jacks at the bottom for test leads. The casing is primarily made of green plastic with a slightly contoured, ergonomic shape for comfortable grip. The control panel is black with yellow, white, and red printed labels indicating measurement ranges and functions. The back and sides are smooth and unadorned, providing a sturdy enclosure for the internal electronics. This device is typically used by electricians, technicians, and hobbyists for diagnostic and troubleshooting tasks in urban environments.
description: A handheld digital multimeter with a green plastic casing, LCD display, rotary dial, and color-coded input jacks for electrical measurements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the LCD display, rotary selector dial, and input jacks with detailed printed labels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the contoured green casing and partial visibility of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unmarked green plastic back of the device.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the thickness and ergonomic curvature of the green casing.
